title: Sweet Ukrainian Mint Delight
description: A refreshing dessert that combines the sweetness of Ukrainian honey with the cooling taste of mint.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the honey, mint leaves, and lemon juice. Stir until the honey is well combined with the mint.
In a separate bowl, whip the heavy cream until it forms stiff peaks.
Add the vanilla extract to the whipped cream and stir well.
Fold the whipped cream mixture into the honey-mint mixture until well combined.
Pour the mixture into individual serving bowls.
Sprinkle granulated sugar over the top of each serving.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
